zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡整理偏弱运行
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD整体处于高位窄幅震荡格局，价格略低于20日均线1596附近，短线动能偏弱，市场缺乏明确突破方向，整体以横盘整理为主

技术指标方面，MACD数值维持2.52上方，显示一定多头动能但缺乏信号线确认，RSI未提供难以判断超买超卖，整体动量偏中性略多

支撑位关注1588一线，若跌破可能测试1585区域；上方阻力集中在1596及1600整数关口，突破前仍以压制为主运行区间收窄

交易策略建议以区间操作为主，靠近1588附近可分批轻仓试多，上方1596-1600区域逢高减仓，严格设置止损控制波动风险

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum vs US Dollar is currently in a tight consolidation phase around 1592, following a prolonged period of sideways movement after recent volatility. Price action remains compressed between intraday highs near 1593.88 and lows at 1588.45, indicating market indecision. Overall structure suggests a neutral-to-slightly bearish bias as price struggles to reclaim the 20-period moving average. Momentum remains muted, with no clear breakout signal yet visible.

Technical indicators present a mixed but cautious outlook. Price is trading below the 20-period SMA at 1596.55, suggesting short-term bearish pressure and resistance overhead. MACD remains slightly positive at 2.52, but the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of bullish momentum. Without RSI data, momentum strength is unclear. Overall indicators point to weakening upside traction and a market awaiting directional catalyst before committing to a breakout.

Immediate support is located at the recent low around 1588.45, with a secondary support zone near 1575 if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, resistance is forming at 1596.55, aligned with the 20-SMA, followed by a stronger barrier around 1600 and then 1610. The tight range between support and resistance suggests a breakout-driven setup, with liquidity likely building at both extremes.

Given the current compression, traders may favor range-bound strategies, buying near support at 1588 while taking partial profits near 1596–1600 resistance. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above 1600 for bullish continuation toward 1610, or a breakdown below 1588 for bearish extension toward 1575. Risk management remains critical, as low volatility increases false breakout risk and sudden directional expansion.
